programme.desc: When Prince Ivan is kidnapped, it&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s up to Bartok to rescue the young Romanoff - even if it means confronting the evil witch Baba Yaga.

programme.title: Manou the Swift
programme.desc: Thinking he is a seagull, a bird named Manou discovers that he is actually a swift who was adopted. Manou sets off on a quest to learn his true identity, but when danger looms Manou must become the hero he was meant to be.

programme.title: Khumba
programme.desc: Rejected by his superstitious herd, a young zebra named Khumba embarks on a daring quest across the Karoo desert to earn his stripes.

programme.title: Horrid Henry: The Movie
programme.desc: When he fails to hand in his homework, Henry sets off a chain of events and finds himself trying to save the school he&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s professed to hate.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: After being magically transported to a secret universe, a young girl teams up with a band of warriors to help save their world.

programme.title: Paddington In Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and the Brown family head to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy. A thrilling adventure ensues when a mystery plunges them into a unexpected journey through the Amazon.

programme.title: Pudsey the Movie
programme.desc: Soon after settling in with his new family, a formerly stray dog learns their landlord is planning something terrible.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A rebellious Peter Rabbit and his sisters spend their days sneaking into Mr McGregor&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s vegetable garden. When Mr McGregor suddenly passes away, a much more formidable McGregor moves in.

programme.title: City of Ember
programme.desc: The city of Ember was built as an underground refuge for the human race - but now their power supply is fading. When Lina finds part of an ancient message she is sure it holds the secret that will save the city.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Time for bed! We&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;ll see you first thing in the morning.

programme.title: Ramona and Beezus
programme.desc: An adventurous young girl uses her imagination to escape her reality, but it&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s rapidly spinning out of control.

programme.title: Robo-Dog
programme.desc: After the family dog tragically passes away, inventor Tom Austin creates a robotic replacement, complete with mechanical abilities.

programme.title: The Super Elfkins
programme.desc: Elfie&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s world is upended when she discovers the existence of a technically advanced Elfkin clan, which is in stark contrast to her own.

programme.title: The Pebble &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; The Penguin

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: The life of a lovable dog is turned upside down when his family go on holiday without him and he finds himself captive in a canine prison.

programme.title: Marmaduke
programme.desc: With the help of his best feline friend, a lovable dog named Marmaduke helps his family adjust to their new lives in Orange County, California.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: With a mysterious villain outmatching their abilities in every way, Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails seek an unlikely alliance to protect the planet.

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: When a domesticated grizzly bear and a one-horned mule deer become stranded in the woods during hunting season, it&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s up to the duo to turn the tables on the hunters.

programme.title: Spark
programme.desc: Spark is a wisecracking teenage monkey who lives on an abandoned planet with his friends Chunk and Vix. When an evil warlord plans to destroy the entire universe, no one but Spark can stop him.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary LEGO figurine finds himself on an epic quest to stop an evil tyrant from gluing the universe together, a journey for which he is hopelessly and hilariously underprepared.
